title: BEM-568 auto-run token smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wf=wfs/'claude-token-smoke.yml'
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
new='''name: Claude Token Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - '.github/workflows/claude-token-smoke.yml'
      - 'scripts/claude_token_smoke.py'

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  check-secret:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Check secret presence and write report
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_token_smoke.py

      - name: Commit smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md governance/transport/results.jsonl
          git commit -m "BEM-568 Claude token smoke result" || echo "No changes"
          git push
'''
wf.write_text(new)
# touch script to ensure push path triggers when this commit lands
smoke=Path('scripts/claude_token_smoke.py')
if smoke.exists():
    s=smoke.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'BEM-568 auto-run marker' not in s:
        s += '\n# BEM-568 auto-run marker: push trigger enabled for safe secret presence smoke.\n'
        smoke.write_text(s)
report=reports/'bem568_auto_run_claude_token_smoke.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-568 | Auto-run Claude Token Smoke | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 21:00 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\n`claude-token-smoke.yml` now has `workflow_dispatch` and safe `push` trigger limited to the smoke workflow/script paths. This lets GitHub run the smoke automatically after this commit without operator manual Run workflow.\n\n## Security\nThe smoke only checks whether the secret exists. It never prints token value.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
record={'record_type':'bem568_auto_run_claude_token_smoke','cycle_id':'bem568-auto-run-claude-token-smoke','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(wf),'trigger':'push_paths_limited','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 21:00 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem568_auto_run_claude_token_smoke']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(wf),'trigger':'workflow_dispatch_plus_limited_push','blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 21:00 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem568_auto_run_claude_token_smoke.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-568 PASS: claude-token-smoke.yml has limited push trigger and workflow_dispatch.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(wf),str(smoke),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Enabled automatic safe Claude token smoke via limited push trigger without printing token')
"""
